amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 62 — paragraph 1 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 62 — paragraph 1 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1 a. Upon establishing a causal link between the AI system and the serious incident or the reasonable likelihood of such a link, providers shall take appropriate corrective actions pursuant to Article 21.
parliament_text: 1 a. Upon establishing a causal link between the AI system and the serious incident or the reasonable likelihood of such a link, providers shall take appropriate corrective actions pursuant to Article 21.
